name: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Gorilla
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>勇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－エンショウ
desc: Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Set 1 "Fire Formation" Spell directly from your Deck. Once per turn: You can send 1 face-up "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap you control to the GY, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Set 1 "Fire Formation" Spell directly from your Deck. Once per turn: You can send 1 face-up "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap you control to the GY, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.
eff: Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Set 1 "Fire Formation" Spell directly from your Deck. Once per turn: You can send 1 face-up "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap you control to the GY, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
